boundary_interpretation.known_green: c8 rowchunk2 retained path remained generated-token-equality green in prior artifacts.
boundary_interpretation.known_red: c8 fullnative / chunk8 retained path failed generated-token equality in prior artifacts.
boundary_interpretation.new_result: c8 rowchunk4 fails generated-token equality, so the safe full-attention grouping boundary for this workload remains rowchunk2; rowchunk4 throughput/scaling values are not claim-eligible.
boundary_interpretation.next_fix_target: Investigate grouped full-attention numerical drift before/around layer4 RMSNorm rather than promoting larger chunks without equality.

conclusion: Rowchunk4 is not a correctness-safe intermediate for c8 512/128 L40. Despite favorable native throughput fields in the rejected run, generated-token equality fails with min prefix 11 and rows 0/4/5 mismatching; no retained performance/scaling claim is made.

blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path on selected layers

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: focused c8 full-attention grouping boundary diagnostic with artifact evidence. It does not improve c2 metric or enable a performance claim, but directly constrains the correctness fix path: rowchunk4 is red, leaving rowchunk2 as the current safe boundary and pointing back to grouped full-attention/layer4 RMSNorm drift.
